title: Sword Hero Dual Composition Poster AI
sourceTitle: Sword Hero Dual Composition Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable cinematic sword hero poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable cinematic sword hero poster built around adult wandering swordswoman. signature elements: dual wuxia composition, cliffside back view, half-face close-up, restrained sword tension, and vertical title inscription layout logic: left cliffside back view and right half-face close-up must balance into one tense cinematic poster rather than two unrelated panels annotation system: vertical film title text should be short, readable, and integrated as a calligraphic poster element worldbuilding: misty bamboo bridge at dawn, long straight sword with rain beads, and MIST EDGE carry the wuxia/cinematic narrative hook composition: stable composition, poster-first hierarchy, dominant hero image, secondary detail layers, and a clean title-ready area. style: Restrained wuxia film-poster language with dusk rim light, cliffside silhouette, severe half-face close-up, calligraphic title, and quiet lethal tension. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: adult wandering swordswoman as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: misty bamboo bridge at dawn defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place color palette: warm gold highlights with refined neutral supporting colors lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
imagePrompts.title: Adult Wandering Swordswoman Misty Bamboo Bridge
